summary: Amendment capabilities testing completed successfully. All backend endpoints (PUT /api/compliance/{policies|insurance|incidents}/{id}/amend and GET /api/compliance/{policies|insurance|incidents}/{id}/history) are working correctly. Frontend UI shows Edit and History buttons for policies, insurance, and incidents with proper modal forms including required 'Reason for Change' field and audit trail messaging.
passed_tests: ✅ Backend: PUT /api/compliance/policies/{id}/amend - requires reason field (422 without)
✅ Backend: PUT /api/compliance/policies/{id}/amend - successfully amends with reason
✅ Backend: GET /api/compliance/policies/{id}/history - returns amendment history
✅ Backend: PUT /api/compliance/insurance/{id}/amend - requires reason field (422 without)
✅ Backend: PUT /api/compliance/insurance/{id}/amend - successfully amends with reason
✅ Backend: PUT /api/compliance/insurance/{id}/amend - updates expiry date correctly
✅ Backend: GET /api/compliance/insurance/{id}/history - returns amendment history
✅ Backend: PUT /api/compliance/incidents/{id}/amend - requires reason field (422 without)
✅ Backend: PUT /api/compliance/incidents/{id}/amend - successfully amends with reason
✅ Backend: PUT /api/compliance/incidents/{id}/amend - updates multiple fields at once
✅ Backend: GET /api/compliance/incidents/{id}/history - returns amendment history
✅ Backend: History preserves previous state of records
✅ Backend: 404 returned for non-existent records
✅ Frontend: Edit button visible for policies with uploaded files
✅ Frontend: Edit button visible for insurance with uploaded files
✅ Frontend: Edit button visible for all incidents
✅ Frontend: History button visible for policies, insurance, incidents
✅ Frontend: Policy Edit modal shows 'Reason for Change *' required field
✅ Frontend: Insurance Edit modal shows 'Reason for Change *' required field
✅ Frontend: Incident Edit modal shows 'Reason for Change *' required field
✅ Frontend: Validation error shown when saving without reason
✅ Frontend: 'Incident updated successfully' toast on successful save
✅ Frontend: Amendment History modal shows all amendments with reasons and dates
✅ Frontend: History entries show Reason badge, Title, Type, Date, Status
critical_code_review_comments: Amendment endpoints correctly store previous state in 'history' array before updating
Pydantic models (InsuranceDocUpdate, OrgPolicyAmend, IncidentLogAmend) correctly require 'reason' field
History endpoints return sorted history (most recent first)
Frontend correctly shows Edit buttons only for records with uploaded files (policies/insurance)
Frontend correctly shows Edit buttons for all incidents
Amendment modal includes audit trail messaging: 'This will be recorded in the audit trail for CQC compliance'
seed_data_creation: Created test incident for amendment testing (TEST_Amendment_Incident_*)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Amendment capabilities fully implemented and tested. Backend endpoints at lines 10140-10375 in server.py. Frontend ComplianceCentrePage.js has Edit/History buttons and modals. History modal shows 'No amendments recorded' for records without amendments, and shows full audit trail with Reason badges for amended records.

frontend_ui.Edit buttons: Visible for policies/insurance with files, all incidents
frontend_ui.History buttons: Visible for all policies, insurance, incidents
frontend_ui.Edit modal: Shows all editable fields + required 'Reason for Change' field
frontend_ui.History modal: Shows amendment timeline with reasons, dates, previous values
